title: PreApplicationMeeting
description: A BSA pre-application meeting — the pre-filing consultation between a prospective applicant and Board staff, before a case is formally filed. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Pre-Application Meetings' dataset (855v-w7mc, 17 columns).

applicationType.description: Type of meeting or anticipated application ('application_type'), e.g. 'Pre-application meeting'.

calendar.description: Calendar number if one has been assigned ('calendar'); often 'N/A' at this stage.
